message:
chore: remove orphaned test_notify.rs binary (superseded by sync::Notify tests)

src/bin/test_notify.rs was a 37-line standalone binary that manually polled
a Notify future with a noop waker. This functionality is fully covered by
the sync::Notify test suite (src/sync/notify.rs) which tests the same
wake/poll interactions with proper assertions. The binary had no build
target referencing it and was unreachable from cargo build/test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
